title: AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5503 / 53 OG No. 16, 5150 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1730, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND A CERTAIN ITEM IN SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item four, Group I, under

aw

. Tarlac, page six hundred forty-three, section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"4. Malacampa Elementary School Building, Camiling

Repair and completion

P 10,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
